randomizeFirstPlayer() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Game
Randomizes and sets the first player for the game.

Reads messages from the queue and processes them.
readQueue() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.Server
Reads messages from the queue and processes them using the Lobby.

Receives messages from the server.

Receives a message from the server.

Message sent from server to client to deliver a chat message.

Refreshes the list of games by requesting an updated game list from the server.

The ResourceCard class represents a resource card of the game.

Constructs a new ResourceCard instance with the specified values.

ResourceDeckMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ServerToClient
Message sent from server to client to update the resource deck.

Message sent from server to client to update the resources counter of a player.

Constructs a ResourcesMessage with the specified client ID, resources map, and player nickname.
RIGHT_DIAGONAL - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Structure
 
RMIClient - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client
This client communicates with the server using RMI.
RMIClient(String, int, View) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.RMIClient
Constructs a new RMIClient.
RMIFactory - Interface in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server
Defines the methods that must be implemented by any remote object acting as an RMI factory for creating and managing client-server communication handlers.
RMIFactoryImpl - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server
The RMIFactoryImpl class implements the RMIFactory interface to provide RMI factory functionalities for creating and managing client-server communication handlers.
RMIFactoryImpl(Server) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.RMIFactoryImpl
Constructs an RMIFactoryImpl object with the specified Server instance.
RMIHandlerClient - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client
The RMIHandlerClient class handles the communication between the RMI client and the server.
RMIHandlerClient(RMIClient, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Client.RMIHandlerClient
Constructs a new RMIHandlerClient.
RMIHandlerServer - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server
The RMIHandlerServer class extends AbstractHandler and represents a server-side handler for managing RMI-based client-server communication.
RMIHandlerServer(int, Server) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.RMIHandlerServer
Constructs an RMIHandlerServer object with the specified client ID and Server instance.
run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Server.SocketHandler
Runs the thread for handling incoming messages from the client.
run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.Cli
The main execution method of the Runnable interface.
run() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIView
